Episodes.Title: Terror of the Autons: Episode One
Episodes.Writer: Robert Holmes, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Nicholas Courtney, Roger Delgado
Episodes.Plot: When a Nestene Energy Unit is stolen and a radio telescope sabotaged, the Doctor is contacted by a Time Lord who tells him his old rival the Master is responsible.

Episodes.Title: Terror of the Autons: Episode Two
Episodes.Writer: Robert Holmes, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Nicholas Courtney, Roger Delgado
Episodes.Plot: Attempting to find out where Jo encountered the Master, the Doctor heads to the circus where he falls foul of Rossini.

Episodes.Title: Terror of the Autons: Episode Three
Episodes.Writer: Robert Holmes, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Nicholas Courtney, Roger Delgado
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and the Brigadier head to Farrel's factory but the Master and the Autons have already left and are distributing plastic daffodils around the country.

Episodes.Title: Terror of the Autons: Episode Four
Episodes.Writer: Robert Holmes, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Nicholas Courtney, Roger Delgado
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor discovers the plastic daffodils are designed to fire a spray that asphyxiates people, causing havoc prior to the Nestene's arrival, but before he can alert anyone he and Jo are captured by the Master.

Episodes.Title: The Mind of Evil: Episode One
Episodes.Writer: Don Houghton, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Nicholas Courtney, Katy Manning
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Jo head to Stangmoor Prison to investigate the Keller Machine, which drains the evil impulses from prisoners' minds, while UNIT are handling security at the first world peace conference.

Episodes.Title: The Mind of Evil: Episode Two
Episodes.Writer: Don Houghton, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Roger Delgado, Nicholas Courtney
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor is recalled by UNIT to help investigate Cheng-Tiek's murder but is unaware that Chin-Lee is under the control of the Master.

Episodes.Title: The Mind of Evil: Episode Three
Episodes.Writer: Don Houghton, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Roger Delgado, Nicholas Courtney
Episodes.Plot: Realising Chin-Lee has been using the power of the Keller Machine to carry out assassinations, the Doctor heads back to Stangmoor, only to find the Master has teamed up with Mailer to stage another riot.

Episodes.Title: The Mind of Evil: Episode Four
Episodes.Writer: Don Houghton, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Roger Delgado, Nicholas Courtney
Episodes.Plot: With the Doctor and Jo being held prisoner, the Master convinces Mailer to help him steal the Thunderbolt.

Episodes.Title: The Mind of Evil: Episode Five
Episodes.Writer: Don Houghton, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Roger Delgado, Nicholas Courtney
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor is forced to help the Master control the mind parasite while Yates finds out where the Thunderbolt has been taken only to be captured by the Master's men.

Episodes.Title: The Mind of Evil: Episode Six
Episodes.Writer: Don Houghton, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Roger Delgado, Nicholas Courtney
Episodes.Plot: The Brigadier has recaptured Stangmoor but the Master still has control of the Thunderbolt and the Doctor must find a way to stop him and destroy the Keller Machine.

Episodes.Title: The Claws of Axos: Episode One
Episodes.Writer: Bob Baker, Dave Martin, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Nicholas Courtney, Roger Delgado
Episodes.Plot: When a mysterious object lands near the Nuton power complex, UNIT investigate and encounter the Axons, a group of aliens who offer the mineral axonite, which can duplicate matter, as a gift.

Episodes.Title: The Claws of Axos: Episode Two
Episodes.Writer: Bob Baker, Dave Martin, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Nicholas Courtney, Roger Delgado
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Winser begin to analyse axonite while Chinn plots to secure its use exclusively for Britain.

Episodes.Title: The Claws of Axos: Episode Three
Episodes.Writer: Bob Baker, Dave Martin, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Nicholas Courtney, Roger Delgado
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Jo are being held prisoner by Axos while Chinn is forced to organise the worldwide distribution of axonite and the Master returns to the power complex to try and steal the TARDIS.

Episodes.Title: The Claws of Axos: Episode Four
Episodes.Writer: Bob Baker, Dave Martin, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Nicholas Courtney, Roger Delgado
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Jo escape from Axos but then the Doctor offers the Master a deal:if he helps him repair the TARDIS, they can flee Earth together.

Episodes.Title: Colony in Space: Episode One
Episodes.Writer: Malcolm Hulke, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Nicholas Courtney, Katy Manning
Episodes.Plot: The Time Lords takes control of the TARDIS and the Doctor and Jo arrive on a Earth Colony in the 25th Century, where a ruthless mining company are using a dinosaur-like creature to force the colonists to leave the planet. Where th...

Episodes.Title: Colony in Space: Episode Two
Episodes.Writer: Malcolm Hulke, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Katy Manning, Bernard Kay
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor discovers an Interplanetary Mining Corporation ship has landed on the planet in order to mine its duralinium, while Norton begins causing trouble at the colony.

Episodes.Title: Colony in Space: Episode Three
Episodes.Writer: Malcolm Hulke, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Katy Manning, Bernard Kay
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor makes it back to the colony and warns Ashe what Dent is up to but when Jo and Winton try to find proof they are captured.

Episodes.Title: Colony in Space: Episode Four
Episodes.Writer: Malcolm Hulke, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Roger Delgado, Katy Manning
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor descends into the Primitive city to try and find Jo while the colonists receive a visit from the Adjudicator.

Episodes.Title: Colony in Space: Episode Five
Episodes.Writer: Malcolm Hulke, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Roger Delgado, Katy Manning
Episodes.Plot: The Master offers to help the colonists in exchange for information on the Primitive city and forces the Doctor to act as a guide by taking Jo hostage.

Episodes.Title: Colony in Space: Episode Six
Episodes.Writer: Malcolm Hulke, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Roger Delgado, Nicholas Courtney
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and the Master are taken into the Primitive city, where the Master hopes to find the doomsday weapon, while Dent forces the colonists to leave the planet even though their ship is likely to explode.

Episodes.Title: The Dæmons: Episode One
Episodes.Writer: Barry Letts, Sydney Newman, Robert Sloman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Nicholas Courtney, Roger Delgado
Episodes.Plot: The Master raises the Devil. The Doctor becomes a wizard.

Episodes.Title: The Dæmons: Episode Two
Episodes.Writer: Barry Letts, Sydney Newman, Robert Sloman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Nicholas Courtney, Roger Delgado
Episodes.Plot: With the Doctor frozen by the energy release from the barrow, Jo calls Yates and Benton for help, but when the Brigadier tries to join them he finds the village surrounded by a heat barrier.

Episodes.Title: The Dæmons: Episode Three
Episodes.Writer: Barry Letts, Sydney Newman, Robert Sloman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Nicholas Courtney, Roger Delgado
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor explains to his friends that the Master is trying to gain the power of the last of the Daemons, a race who influenced Earth's development, while the Master brings the rest of the village under his control.

Episodes.Title: The Dæmons: Episode Four
Episodes.Writer: Barry Letts, Sydney Newman, Robert Sloman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Nicholas Courtney, Roger Delgado
Episodes.Plot: The Master orders Bert to set a trap for the Doctor at the village while a concussed Jo makes for the cavern.

Episodes.Title: The Dæmons: Episode Five
Episodes.Writer: Barry Letts, Sydney Newman, Robert Sloman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Nicholas Courtney, Roger Delgado
Episodes.Plot: The Master decides to sacrifice Jo to Azal and when the Doctor and his friends try to intervene they come under attack from Bok.
